source_or_gap: The ASI Stack discusses semantic IR, world models, routing, replaceable substrates, and procedural compilation, but no current chapter owns the conjunction of dimensional typing, semantic/computational/storage arity, persistent role-sensitive relation objects, adaptive relational order, relation qualification lifecycle, and reversible semantic contraction.
chapter_action_policy: Integrate bounded source-grounded distinctions into the existing owners now. Preserve relational-dimension-compilation-and-polyadic-cognition as a distinct future chapter candidate, but create no chapter path, manifest entry, proof target, or admission packet while the active Round 16 chapter freeze remains in force.
merge_or_split_policy: Keep accepted-obligation translation in Cognitive Compilation, predictive reality state in Governed World Models, operator dispatch in Routing, component ABI in Replaceable Substrates, and consolidation in Procedural Memory. A later RDC chapter should own only the unclaimed relational topology lifecycle and point to those adjacent owners rather than duplicating them.
boundary_decision_rationale: The proposed RDC owner has a distinct request/packet interface, dimensional type system, relation object and incidence artifacts, qualification lifecycle, contraction certificate, operator registry, and RODIE falsification program. Folding all of that into Cognitive Compilation would blur world-structure construction with source-to-target obligation preservation; folding it into World Models would blur representation/runtime compilation with prediction and reality reconciliation.
external_literature_need: verify the paper's higher-order attention, graph/hypergraph, topological, object-centric, equivariant, neural-operator, adaptive-compute, and tensor-factorization bibliography source by source
add recent primary work on dynamic relation discovery, role-sensitive n-ary representations, learned contraction, and sparse relational hardware where the paper's bibliography is incomplete
identify strong natural-domain evaluations with independent latent structure or intervention ground truth
proof_or_test_backlog: formalize finite typed role-preserving reification while keeping its inference ceiling at representational sufficiency
define schemas for RelationalConstructionRequest, QualifiedRelationalComplexPacket, AxisType, RelationInstance, TypedIncidence, RelationalOrderDecision, and ContractionCertificate
build mutation suites for role swap, branch leakage, untyped contraction, candidate-denominator deletion, authority laundering, stale cache reuse, and silent slow-path retirement
construct a bounded RODIE pilot with unary, pairwise, triadic, role-binding, branch, and contraction tasks plus stronger pairwise rescues
measure proposal recall, order regret, role accuracy, intervention fidelity, branch leakage, contraction fidelity, expansion triggers, compiled-route equivalence, and complete lifecycle cost
transfer one qualified mechanism to a natural workload and reproduce it independently before any broader claim
evidence_transition_precondition: exact claim atom and maximum inference identified before testing
candidate generation information and denominators matched or explicitly priced across arms
strong lower-order, fixed-order, symbolic, oracle, and ablation baselines receive competent rescue
held-out topology, filler, role, branch, scale, and environment splits frozen before outcomes
independent final evaluator and complete failed-run/candidate denominator
required_before_drafting: completed full source reading and public-safe source note
completed existing-owner and proposed-owner boundary audit
completed source storage and provenance verification
completed bounded integration across the nine existing owners
pending birth-complete atom, reader, source-role, ownership, and W3 inheritance packet
promotion_blockers: active roadmap freezes all new chapter adjudication and manifest admission
no RDC implementation or RODIE corpus exists
no trained relational-order router or natural-task result exists
the finite reification result is representational rather than computational or empirical
external literature cited by the paper has not yet been independently passage-reviewed as one coordinated source packet
no accepted evidence transition promotes an RDC mechanism or chapter core
residuals: existing chapters can absorb only bounded interface distinctions without becoming duplicate RDC owners
the exact Part II versus Part III placement remains for post-freeze adjacency adjudication
RODIE needs an anti-self-confirmation design so its generators do not simply encode RDC assumptions
object-field coupling, schema evolution, privacy of inferred relations, and contraction-certificate composition require deeper source programs
next_action: Verify the external bibliography source by source; after the structural freeze clears, adjudicate relational-dimension-compilation-and-polyadic-cognition atomically with its source roles, atom pack, reader projection, W3 inheritance check, ownership crosswalk, formal ceiling, and unexecuted RODIE protocol.
non_claims: does not add or reserve a manifest chapter during the freeze
does not establish that higher-order kernels outperform Transformers
does not prove bounded primitive arity universally sufficient
does not validate relation truth, grounding, causality, interpretability, safety, privacy, or authority
does not promote any chapter core, support state, release, deployment, publication, AGI, or ASI claim
